examples: He defeated the Nawab at Plassey in 1757 and captured Calcutta.
Mansur Ali Khan Pataudi, last Nawab of Pataudi and captain of India, died on September 22nd, aged 70.
The Common Nawab is found all over Asia and is a superb specimen with a wingspan of about ten centimeters.
